ibis.text: How is long covid diagnosed and managed?
NICE defines long covid as symptoms that develop during or after a Covid-19 infection, continue for more than 12 weeks, and are not explained by an alternative diagnosis.
orig: Post-Covid-19 syndrome: signs and symptoms that develop during or after an infection consistent with Covid-19, that continue for more than 12 weeks, and are not explained by an alternative diagnosis.

ibis.text: What are the biological causes of long covid?
The causes of long covid may include persistent infection, immune system problems, and issues with blood clotting.
orig: Persistent infection with the SARS-CoV-2 virus, which causes Covid-19
Problems with blood clotting and changes to endothelial cells

ibis.text: Is long covid classified as a disability under the Equality Act 2010?
orig: Whether long covid is a disability

ibis.text: Long covid is considered a disability if it has a substantial and long-term adverse effect on an individual's ability to carry out normal day-to-day activities.
orig: In cases where long covid has a substantial effect on someone’s ability to carry out day-to-day activities and where it lasts or seems likely to last at least 12 months, it will be considered a disability in law.

ibis.text: Some employment tribunals have ruled that cases of long covid meet the legal test for a disability and are protected under the Equality Act.
orig: There have been some cases where employment tribunals have ruled that cases of long covid do meet the legal test for a disability and so should have been protected under the Equality Act.

ibis.text: Should long covid be recognised as a prescribed occupational disease for Industrial Injuries Disablement Benefit?
orig: Debate about including long covid as a prescribed disease

ibis.text: The Industrial Injuries Advisory Council found that there was not sufficient evidence to recommend general prescription for long covid at this time.
orig: IIAC therefore considered there was not sufficient evidence at that time to recommend general prescription for long covid/post-Covid syndrome.

ibis.text: There is convincing and consistent evidence of five serious pathological complications in health and social workers that supports prescription for those specific conditions.
orig: IIAC found "convincing and consistent evidence" of five serious pathological complications for health and social workers with long covid.
